identity.title: Fast Enough
identity.styleSentence: A high-energy late-90s futuristic R&B track at 108 BPM featuring bright FM synth leads, funky basslines, and bouncy New Jack swing drums that evoke a Sega Genesis aesthetic with crisp snares, arpeggiated game-like runs, and sparkling chord stabs.
identity.vocalStyle: Smooth confident male R&B lead with catchy harmonies, flirty swagger, and danceable hip-hop cadence.

lyrics.text:
[Intro - Immediate Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Verse 1]
Green light, go, we on a mission
Heart in overdrive, no hesitation
Spin through the night with you
Everything feels brand new

You got me moving at the speed of you
No checkpoints, we don’t save and quit
Just keep running through the city lights
You and me, yeah, we about to win

[Pre-Hook]
Loops and turns, we don’t hit the brakes
Sky so blue, no room for mistakes
If you with me, then we going all the way
No time to waste, it’s our day

[Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Post-Hook]
Ring-ring, heart light
Level up all night
Spring bounce, take flight
You and me, we feel right

[Verse 2]
From the block to the boardwalk lights
We shine together, everything’s right
Bounce on springs, we rise so high
Nothing can stop us, we touch the sky

You’re my boost, I’m your invincible
Golden love, yeah, we collect it
Too fast, too smooth, they can’t catch us
You know how we run it

[Bridge - Dance Breakdown]
Dum da da da dum dum
Move like that, don’t slow
Dum da da da dum dum
Baby, let the whole night glow

Level up, level up
We go fast, fast enough
Level up, level up
I could be the one you want

[Final Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Outro]
Gotta go fast
With you
New level unlocked

analysis.summary: This high-energy R&B/hip-hop fusion track captures a playful, futuristic romance where two lovers navigate city streets at breakneck speed, blending nostalgic Sega Genesis gaming aesthetics with smooth late-90s summer vibes.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing neon speed line streaking through a futuristic city skyline at night, leaving light trails behind like digital brushstrokes.
Golden energy particles swirling around a figure's feet as they leap upward against gravity, surrounded by floating geometric shapes.
A translucent police car with flashing lights speeding past in the background while two silhouettes laugh and run ahead freely.
Bokeh orbs of blue, purple, and gold reflecting off wet asphalt under a summer night sky filled with stars and city glow.
A retro 16-bit pixel heart icon shattering into confetti as it reaches the top of an invisible mountain peak.
Two figures standing back-to-back with a shimmering force field made of digital circuitry protecting them from falling debris.
